title: Crunchy Turkish Toast
description: A simple and delicious snack that combines crunchy textures with the richness of butter and the flavor of Turkish bread.

ingredients.name: chilled
ingredients.notes: such as cucumber or carrot sticks

ingredients.name: crunchy
ingredients.notes: such as chopped nuts or seeds

instructions: Preheat a toaster or toaster oven to 350°F (175°C).
Slice the Turkish bread into 1-inch (2.5 cm) thick slices.
Arrange the bread slices on a baking sheet.
Dot the top of each bread slice with 1-2 tablespoons of softened butter.
Sprinkle the chopped nuts or seeds over the butter.
Bake for 5-7 minutes, or until the bread is toasted to your liking.
Serve the toasted bread with the chilled accompaniments on the side.
